sentences.target: On croise un âne près du champ.

translations.fr: On croise un âne près du champ.
translations.en: We run into a donkey near the field.
translations.es: Nos encontramos con un burro cerca del campo.
translations.de: Wir begegnen einem Esel nahe dem Feld.
translations.it: Incontriamo un asino vicino al campo.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在田地附近碰到一头驴。
translations.yue: 我哋喺田邊遇到一頭驢。
translations.ru: Мы наткнулись на осла возле поля.
translations.pt: Nós encontramos um burro perto do campo.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi tình cờ gặp một con lừa gần cánh đồng.
translations.nl: We komen een ezel tegen bij het veld.
translations.uk: Ми натрапляємо на осла біля поля.
translations.hu: Összefutunk egy szamárral a mező mellett.
translations.hi: हम खेत के पास एक गधे से मिलते हैं.
translations.el: Συναντάμε έναν γάιδαρο κοντά στο χωράφι.
translations.nb: Vi støter på et esel ved åkeren.
translations.id: Kami bertemu seekor keledai di dekat ladang.
translations.sv: Vi stöter på en åsna nära fältet.
translations.da: Vi støder på et æsel ved marken.
translations.ja: 私たちは畑の近くでロバに出くわします。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, often used colloquially for ‘we’; here it is the subject of the verb.
Main verb in present indicative (3rd person singular) agreeing with ‘On’; transitive.
Indefinite article introducing a singular masculine noun.
Common noun (masculine); direct object of the verb.
Adverb forming a complex preposition ‘près de’; expresses proximity.
Contraction of the preposition ‘de’ and the definite article ‘le’; introduces the noun ‘champ’.
Common noun (masculine); complement of the preposition phrase ‘près du’.

sentences.target: Tu dessines un âne pour l'école.

translations.fr: Tu dessines un âne pour l'école.
translations.en: You’re drawing a donkey for school.
translations.es: Estás dibujando un burro para la escuela.
translations.de: Du zeichnest einen Esel für die Schule.
translations.it: Stai disegnando un asino per la scuola.
translations.ko: 너는 학교를 위해 당나귀를 그리고 있어.
translations.pt: Você está desenhando um burro para a escola.
translations.vi: Bạn đang vẽ một con lừa cho trường.
translations.nl: Je tekent een ezel voor school.
translations.hi: तुम स्कूल के लिए एक गधा बना रहे हो.
translations.el: Ζωγραφίζεις έναν γάιδαρο για το σχολείο.
translations.nb: Du tegner et esel til skolen.
translations.id: Kamu menggambar seekor keledai untuk sekolah.
translations.sv: Du ritar en åsna till skolan.
translations.da: Du tegner et æsel til skolen.
translations.ja: あなたは学校のためにロバを描いています。

tokens.explanation: Second-person singular subject pronoun; subject of the verb.
Main verb in present indicative (2nd person singular); transitive.
Indefinite article introducing a singular masculine noun.
Common noun (masculine); direct object of the verb.
Preposition introducing a purpose complement.
Elided definite article before a vowel-initial noun; here underlying ‘la’ (feminine) with ‘école’.
Common noun (feminine); object of the preposition ‘pour’.

translations.en: I hear the donkey behind the farm.
translations.es: Oigo al burro detrás de la granja.
translations.de: Ich höre den Esel hinter dem Bauernhof.
translations.zh-Hans: 我听到农场后面的驴叫。
translations.yue: 我喺農場後面聽到驢叫。
translations.pt: Eu ouço o burro atrás da fazenda.
translations.he: אני שומע את החמור מאחורי החווה.
translations.vi: Tôi nghe con lừa phía sau trang trại.
translations.nl: Ik hoor de ezel achter de boerderij.
translations.hu: Hallom a szamarat a tanya mögött.
translations.hi: मैं खेत के पीछे गधे की आवाज़ सुनता हूँ.
translations.el: Ακούω τον γάιδαρο πίσω από τη φάρμα.
translations.id: Aku mendengar keledai di belakang peternakan.
translations.ja: 私は農場の裏でロバの鳴き声を聞きます。

tokens.explanation: Elided first-person singular subject pronoun before a vowel; subject of the verb.
Main verb in present indicative (1st person singular); transitive.
Elided definite article before a vowel-initial noun; here underlying ‘le’ (masculine) with ‘âne’.
Common noun (masculine); direct object of the verb.
Preposition introducing a locative complement.
Definite article (feminine singular) determining ‘ferme’.
Common noun (feminine); object of the preposition ‘derrière’.

sentences.target: Ils veulent voir un âne au marché.
sentences.reading: /il vœl vwaʁ œ̃ an o maʁʃe/

translations.fr: Ils veulent voir un âne au marché.
translations.ipa: /il vœl vwaʁ œ̃ an o maʁʃe/
translations.en: They want to see a donkey at the market.
translations.es: Quieren ver un burro en el mercado.
translations.de: Sie wollen einen Esel auf dem Markt sehen.
translations.it: Vogliono vedere un asino al mercato.
translations.ko: 그들은 시장에서 당나귀를 보고 싶어 한다.
translations.zh-Hans: 他们想在市场上看一头驴。
translations.yue: 佢哋想喺市場睇一頭驢。
translations.ru: Они хотят увидеть осла на рынке.
translations.pt: Eles querem ver um burro no mercado.
translations.vi: Họ muốn xem một con lừa ở chợ.
translations.ar: هم يريدون رؤية حمار في السوق.
translations.nl: Ze willen een ezel op de markt zien.
translations.uk: Вони хочуть побачити осла на ринку.
translations.hu: Látni akarnak egy szamarat a piacon.
translations.hi: वे बाज़ार में एक गधे को देखना चाहते हैं.
translations.el: Θέλουν να δουν έναν γάιδαρο στην αγορά.
translations.nb: De vil se et esel på markedet.
translations.id: Mereka ingin melihat seekor keledai di pasar.
translations.sv: De vill se en åsna på marknaden.
translations.ro: Ei vor să vadă un măgar la piață.
translations.da: De vil se et æsel på markedet.
translations.ja: 彼らは市場でロバを見たいです。

tokens.explanation: Third-person plural subject pronoun; subject of the verb.
Main verb in present indicative (3rd person plural); takes an infinitive complement.
Infinitive verb complement of ‘veulent’.
Indefinite article introducing a singular masculine noun.
Common noun (masculine); direct object of ‘voir’.
Contraction of the preposition ‘à’ and the definite article ‘le’; introduces the noun ‘marché’.
Common noun (masculine); object of the preposition ‘à’ (via ‘au’).
